author: anon-59ff128d
content: Extracted shared WalkBuilder configuration (gitignore, hidden, follow_links, max_depth, glob overrides) into a private `configure_walk_builder(opts: &DiscoveryOptions) -> io::Result<WalkBuilder>` helper function. Both `discover_files` and `discover_files_parallel` now call it, eliminating ~40 lines of duplicated configuration. The parallel function adds `.threads()` after calling the helper. All 32 ripsed-fs tests pass.
